company.title: Your business
company.subtitle: Tell us briefly who you are.

goal.title: Website goal
goal.subtitle: What should your new website do for you?

pagesFeatures.title: Pages & features
pagesFeatures.subtitle: What should your website be able to do?

contentTech.title: Content & tech
contentTech.subtitle: What do you already have — what do we still need?

budgetTimeline.title: Budget & timeline
budgetTimeline.subtitle: Almost done! Just a few final details.

businessDescription.label: What do you do?
businessDescription.placeholder: e.g. We're an electrical contractor from Munich offering installations for private and commercial customers.

hasLogo.label: Do you already have a logo?

region.label: In which region are you active?

colors.label: Which colors do you like?
colors.placeholder: e.g. black, gold, dark blue – or hex codes

references.label: Do you have website examples you like?
references.placeholder: e.g. www.apple.com, www.notion.so – just paste the links

hasTexts.label: Do you already have text content for the website?

hasImages.label: Do you have your own images / photos?

seoImportant.label: Is SEO (Google optimization) important to you?

hasDomain.label: Do you already have a domain / hosting?

deadline.label: When should the website go live?

notes.label: Any other wishes or comments?
notes.placeholder: What else matters to you? Special requirements, ideas, questions...

viewModal.title: Website briefing – {{projectName}}
viewModal.emptyDescription: The client hasn't filled out or submitted the website briefing via their tracking link yet.
viewModal.draftNotice: Draft – the client hasn't submitted the briefing yet.
viewModal.aiPromptTitle: AI prompt for the website build
viewModal.aiPromptNote: You can hand this prompt directly to an AI coding tool to generate the React + TypeScript project.
viewModal.saveError: The briefing could not be saved.
viewModal.submitError: The briefing could not be submitted.

customerForm.draftSaveError: Autosave failed. Your entries are still kept in the form though.
customerForm.submitError: The briefing could not be submitted. Please try again.
customerForm.thankYouBody: We've received your details and will get back to you shortly. You can change your answers via this link at any time, as long as work on your website hasn't started yet.
customerForm.editingSubmittedNotice: You're editing an already submitted briefing. Save again to apply your changes.
